author: notenerd
description: Preview PowerPoint and Word documents inside Obsidian. Automatically refreshes when you, Claude, or another AI agent makes changes to the file, so your preview is always up to date. Renders via a local LibreOffice install (bring your own, or install one from Settings). - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: notenerd
manifest.description: Preview PowerPoint and Word documents. Automatically refreshes when you, Claude, or another AI agent changes the file, so your preview is always up to date. Renders via a local LibreOffice install (bring your own, or install one from Settings).
manifest.name: Doc Preview

name: Doc Preview

releases.author: NoteNerdOfficial
releases.description: No functional changes from 1.0.1 — new version to trigger a fresh review scan after adding explicit types: ["node"] to tsconfig.json.
